title: Heimat and Landscape: Two Closely Related Concepts
content: Throughout history the German concept ofHeimat('home,''homeland,''homeenvironment') has enjoyed recurrent vogue—as it did at the beginning of the twenty-first century. Whether depoliticized or politicized, the term is associated with many controversies. As a social construct, it is strongly anchored in everyday life, especially through its close connection to landscape. In ...
